context: Lady Gaga and Bruno Mars' 'Die With a Smile' topped the charts with a retro-pop duet that proved superstar collaborations still reign supreme. Kendrick Lamar and SZA continued their hot streaks with 'Luther,' Chappell Roan's 'Pink Pony Club' completed one of the longest viral-to-mainstream journeys in pop history, and Billie Eilish and Shaboozey carried over momentum from 2024 to cement themselves as defining voices of the mid-2020s.
